title: chiloschista lunifera
intro: Chiloschista lunifera, also known as the moon orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chiloschista lunifera include its ability to treat fever, cold, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Chiloschista lunifera is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
